---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Is it related to a frustration with the current starter?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Any mockups, screenshots, or links that help explain the request.
